LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE CGC-14-539861 WITH CASE CGC-15-543883 IS GRANTED BASED ON THE COMMON ISSUES OF LAW AND FACT. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE CONSOLIDATED FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COORDINATE DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE TO AVOID DUPLICATIVE WORK. CASE #539861 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE. calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. Based on the e-mail received by the court, the court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY's Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination is Granted. Counsel for State Farm to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-539861 WITH CASE CGC-15-543883
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DARREL K. KASUTAKE, ESQ. of the Law Offices of Hubert & Yasutake APC, Tel No. 925-680-4266 appearing for the Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company;
Atty. HENRY A. WIRTA, ESQ. of Harrington, Foxx, Dubrow & Canter, LLP, Tel No. 415-288-6600 appearing for Defendant Greatwall Building Contractor, Inc.;
Atty. DANIELLE N. LINCORS, ESQ. of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara, LLP, Tel No. 818-712-9800 appearing telephonically for Defendant Peninsula Fire Protection.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE CGC-14-539861 WITH CASE CGC-15-543883 is granted based on the common issues of law and fact. The court orders the case consolidated for trial purposes. The parties are ordered to coordinate discovery and motion practice to avoid duplicative work. Case #539861 is designated the lead case. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-539861 WITH CASE CGC-15-543883 is Granted. No opposition filed. Case No. CGC-15-543883 shall be consolidated with case No. CGC-14-539861 for all purposes. Lead case number is 539681. Moving party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
